Dockerfile EXPOSE ports: 5000, 8080. with 2 webhook(s) (1 validating, 1 mutating). protected by 2 network policy/policies. connecting to external services: azure-blob, minio, mysql, s3. runtime dependencies: MinIO/S3, MySQL, OpenTelemetry Collector, ame, kubernetes, name, service. defining 2 API spec type(s) across 31 struct(s) with 124 total fields. with 123 operator config constants (15 image references). following 9 reconciliation steps across 1 controller(s). exposing 67 Prometheus metrics. reporting 10 status condition types. with 2 ingress route(s).
